title: About Us
tagline: Secure, Fast, and Private VPN Service
description: NyxVPN is dedicated to providing secure and private internet access for users worldwide. Our mission is to make online privacy accessible to everyone.

features.title: Military-Grade Encryption
features.description: AES-256 encryption to protect your data from prying eyes

features.title: High-Speed Servers
features.description: Optimized servers in 50+ countries for blazing fast speeds

features.title: No-Logs Policy
features.description: We never track, store, or share your online activities

features.title: Global Network
features.description: Access geo-restricted content from anywhere in the world

features.title: Multi-Platform Support
features.description: Protect all your devices with a single subscription

features.title: 24/7 Support
features.description: Round-the-clock customer support for all your queries

story: Founded in 2024, NyxVPN started with a simple idea: everyone deserves privacy online. We built a VPN service that combines military-grade security, lightning-fast speeds, and effortless simplicity. Our team consists of privacy advocates, security experts, and developers who believe that internet privacy is a fundamental right, not a luxury.
mission: To make online privacy accessible, affordable, and easy to use for everyone, everywhere.
vision: A world where internet freedom and privacy are protected by default, not by exception.
